name: Azerbaijan
avoid: Mountain drives around Lahij in heavy rain or winter snow
stopoverNote: Baku works well for a 2-night Caspian stopover, but the best Azerbaijan trip adds Sheki and the mountain craft towns inland.

cities.name: Baku
cities.notes: Caspian capital with Icherisheher lanes, design-led museums, boulevard walks and skyline viewpoints

cities.name: Gobustan
cities.notes: Petroglyph reserve, museum and mud volcano day trip zone southwest of Baku

cities.name: Gabala
cities.notes: Forest-edged resort town with Tufandag cable cars, Nohur Lake and easy mountain access

cities.name: Lahij
cities.notes: Historic mountain craft village known for copper workshops, cobbled lanes and stone houses

cities.name: Sheki
cities.notes: Silk Road town of caravanserais, stained shebeke windows and the ornate Khan's Palace

itinerary.sim: Azercell tourist SIM — easiest airport pickup and the most dependable coverage once you leave Baku for Sheki and Lahij.
apps: Yandex Go (backup cabs outside central Baku)
Google Translate (Azerbaijani / Russian menus and signs)

Baku.name: Baku
Baku.note: Stay in or near Icherisheher so you can walk the Old City at dawn and still reach the bus terminal or airport easily.

days.theme: Icherisheher Heritage, Maiden Tower & Caspian Old Quarter

activities.name: Old City / Icherisheher gate-to-gate walking loop through caravanserais, mosques and stone lanes
Maiden Tower museum and rooftop lookout
Palace of the Shirvanshahs complex
Azerbaijan National Carpet Museum
Little Venice and Baku Boulevard sunset walk

meals: Firuze Restaurant — plov, dolma and local kebabs in central Baku · ₹600–₹1,400 pp
Dolma Restaurant — classic Azerbaijani plates and good vegetarian sides · ₹700–₹1,500 pp
Çay Bağı 145 — tea, qutab and Old City terrace tables · ₹500–₹1,200 pp

days.theme: Heydar Aliyev Center, Flame Towers Skyline & Modern Baku

activities.name: Heydar Aliyev Center exhibitions and architecture visit
Nizami Street and Fountain Square walk
Baku Funicular up to Highland Park
Flame Towers / Highland Park evening viewpoint over Baku Bay
Optional Caspian cruise or tea stop back on the boulevard

meals: Nargiz Restaurant — central Azerbaijani menu with fast service · ₹600–₹1,400 pp
Art Club Restaurant — polished Old City dinner with live music some nights · ₹900–₹2,000 pp
Passage 145 — modern café good for brunch or late dinner · ₹700–₹1,500 pp

Gobustan.name: Gobustan
Gobustan.note: Treat Gobustan as a full day trip from Baku; there is little reason to sleep here unless you have your own car.

days.theme: Rock Art, Mud Volcanoes & Semi-Desert Archaeology

activities.name: Baku to Gobustan bus to Qobustan town plus local taxi, or a shared car direct from Baku
Gobustan Museum and petroglyph reserve ticket
Shared 4x4 out to the mud volcano field
Bibi-Heybat Mosque photo stop on the return to Baku

meals: Çındır Restoranı — kebabs, salads and tandir bread on the Baku–Alat road · ₹480–₹960 pp
Araz Cafe — simple tea-and-shashlik roadside lunch stop · ₹300–₹720 pp

Gabala.name: Gabala
Gabala.note: If the seasonal AZAL flight operates on your dates, Gabala is the one inland stop where flying can meaningfully save time.

days.theme: Tufandag Cable Cars, Nohur Lake & Resort-Air Mountain Scenery

activities.name: Baku to Gabala by seasonal AZAL domestic flight or Baku International Bus Terminal coach
Tufandag Mountain Resort cable car rides
Nohur Lake boardwalk and optional pedal boat
activities.cost: Free walk or ₹240–₹480 pp for boating

activities.name: Yeddi Gozel Waterfall entry with local taxi up the final hill road

meals: Rafting Restaurant Gabala — grilled meats, soups and river-view tables · ₹600–₹1,300 pp
Qafqaz Tufandag Restaurant — convenient mountain lunch stop after the cable car · ₹700–₹1,500 pp
Qafqaz Riverside Restaurant — tea, saj and kebabs by the water · ₹700–₹1,500 pp

Lahij.name: Lahij
Lahij.note: Road conditions matter here — leave early and avoid arriving after dark if you are using shared transport.

days.theme: Copper Workshops, Stone Lanes & Slow Mountain Village Time

activities.name: Gabala to Lahij shared taxi via Ismayilli
Lahij State Historical-Cultural Reserve walking circuit through the craft lanes
Lahij local history museum visit
Copper workshop demo and souvenir browsing
activities.cost: Free to browse; ₹240–₹1,440 depending on purchases

activities.name: Misirgah Mosque quarter and hillside village panorama walk

meals: Karvansaray Lahic — traditional house menu in a heritage-style setting · ₹480–₹960 pp
Ancient Lahij Guest House dinner service — home-cooked village meal, tea and preserves · ₹600–₹1,200 pp
Evim Hotel meal service — simple soups, kebabs and breakfast spreads · ₹480–₹900 pp

Sheki.name: Sheki
Sheki.note: End the inland loop here so you can enjoy the palace quarter slowly and take the comfortable bus or shared taxi back to Baku.

days.theme: Khan's Palace, Caravanserai Courtyards & Sheki Sweets

activities.name: Lahij to Sheki shared taxi with a change near Ismayilli or Gabala
Sheki Khan's Palace guided visit
Upper Caravanserai courtyard and merchants' quarter wander
Sheki halva and local craft shopping stop

meals: Gagarin Restaurant — popular local stop for piti, kebabs and salads · ₹600–₹1,200 pp
Karvansaray Restaurant — atmospheric dinner inside the historic caravanserai complex · ₹720–₹1,350 pp
Shebeke Restaurant — classic Azerbaijani set meals near the palace quarter · ₹600–₹1,200 pp

days.theme: Kish Church Side Trip, Fortress Views & a Slow Final Evening

activities.name: Taxi or shared cab to Kish village and the Church of Kish
Sheki Fortress walls and old neighborhood viewpoints
Craft and tea break around the Yukhari Bash reserve
Evening Sheki to Baku bus or shared taxi booking for the next leg home
activities.cost: ₹634 by bus or ₹1,200–₹1,920 by shared taxi

meals: Mugam Restaurant — broad Azerbaijani menu and easy family-style dinners · ₹600–₹1,200 pp
Serin Cafe — lighter café stop for tea, sweets and breakfast plates · ₹300–₹720 pp
Marxal Restaurant — splurge hillside dinner with mountain views · ₹1,000–₹2,000 pp

connections.method: Bus to Qobustan town plus local taxi, or direct shared car from Baku (about 1–1.5 hrs)
Return by local taxi to the main road and onward bus / shared cab to Baku
Seasonal AZAL domestic flight to Gabala Airport or Baku International Bus Terminal coach (3.5–4 hrs by road)
Return to Baku first, then continue by coach or seasonal flight to Gabala
Shared taxi to Ismayilli and onward Lahij marshrutka / shared cab
Shared taxi via Ismayilli and Gabala, sometimes with one change
Direct shared taxi or bus connection with a short change en route
Intercity coach from Sheki bus station or shared taxi (4.5–5.5 hrs)
connections.cost: ₹634 by bus or ₹1,200–₹1,920 by shared taxi

extras: Absheron Peninsula add-on for Ateshgah Fire Temple and Yanar Dag from Baku
Shamakhi winery detour between Baku and Gabala
Ilisu or Qax mountain day trip from Sheki
More time at Tufandag for hiking or winter skiing in Gabala
